results.title: Celebrating the Winners of the 2026 Hackathon for MCP & AI Agents | Solo.io
results.content:
## Hackathon Winners 🥳🏆

### Building Cool Agents track

This is my personal favorite track and huge congrats to Salvador Arreola (Mexico) for winning this category. He built Frugalia, an Agentic FinOps platform that uses kagent, kgateway and kmcp to autonomously detect, analyze, and resolve infrastructure waste in Kubernetes clusters. I enjoyed reading his blog, watching his project video and exploring the GitHub repository. This is a practical and impactful system that can continuously help teams optimize cloud resource spending in Kubernetes environments. [...] ### Secure & Govern MCP track

The winner of this track goes to Huzefa Hamdard (India), who built an AI-Powered Kubernetes-native governance for MCP (Model Context Protocol) infrastructure. The project monitors agentgateway and kagent resources, evaluates security posture with an MCP-Server-centric scoring model, and provides AI-powered risk analysis via Google Gemini or Ollama. Check out the project video and Github repository to learn more. [...] The runner-up goes to Oswaldo Gomez (Poland). He built a Kubernetes-native clinical AI agent platform that federates multiple MCP servers into a single endpoint, enabling IDEs and AI clients to securely query MIMIC-IV data through agents, tools, and service discovery. Check out his project video and GitHub repository to learn more.

### Explore agentregistry track

The winner of this track is Denys Vasyliev (UK), a long-time contributor to kagent. He built a Kubernetes-native multi-cluster inventory controller for enterprise AI infrastructure, inspired by agentregistry. This project demonstrates strong thinking around scalable AI infrastructure management in cloud-native environments. Check out his project video and GitHub repository to learn more.

### MCP & AI Agents Starter track

# List of Solana AI Hackathon Winner companies in Web3 (2026)

Winners of the Hackathon as annouced on the Send: 

8 projects found · Last updated Jul 15, 2026

## Projects

### SendAI

Accelerating the Solana AI Ecosystem

Send helps developers and users interact with Solana through AI-powered tools, community gaming, and blockchain infrastructure.

### Voltr

Modular infrastructure for DeFi vaults

Voltr is a permissionless toolkit enabling anyone to easily build, customise, and leverage optimised yield vaults on Solana

The Hive logo

### The Hive

A modular network of interoperable DeFi agents

The Hive enables DeFi operations on Solana through AI agents that respond to natural language commands.

JailbreakMe logo

### JailbreakMe [...] Cleopetra logo

### Cleopetra

The OS for LP'ing

Cleopetra automates liquidity provisioning on Solana DEXes through AI-powered position management accessible via Telegram and web dashboard.

ZkAGI logo

### ZkAGI

The World's First Privacy AI DePIN

zkAGI provides privacy-preserving AI infrastructure combining zero-knowledge proofs with decentralized physical infrastructure for secure machine learning.

## Explore 8 Curated Solana AI Hackathon Winner Projects

Welcome to The Grid's comprehensive directory of solana ai hackathon winner projects in the Web3 ecosystem. Our team has hand-reviewed and verified each of these 8 companies to ensure you're discovering legitimate, active projects — not abandoned ventures or AI-generated listings. [...] JailbreakMe logo

### JailbreakMe

The first fairly launched AI security platform where users earn bounties for testing AI agents.

A platform for testing and improving AI agent security through bounty-based vulnerability discovery and verification on Solana.

AgentiPy logo

### AgentiPy

The Python toolkit for connecting AI agents to any onchain app

AgentiPy connects AI agents to onchain applications on Solana and Base through an open-source Python toolkit and no-code automation tools.

FXN logo

### FXN

The Infrastructure for Autonomous AI

FXN connects AI services to real-world execution through autonomous agent infrastructure and resource sharing protocols.

# AI Agents Hackathon 2026

# AI Agents Hackathon 2026

## Build the Future with AI Agents

Artificial Intelligence is evolving beyond models into autonomous systems capable of reasoning, decision-making, and real-world execution. AI Agents Hackathon 2026 brings together developers, researchers, founders, and innovators to build the next generation of intelligent systems powered by modern AI infrastructure.

Organized by HackIndia, India’s largest hackathon series, this hackathon is designed for builders exploring AI agents, automation, large language models, retrieval systems, evaluation pipelines, and real-world AI applications at scale.
